notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Jake Fraley. Carson Kelly scores. Moisés Ballesteros scores. Dansby Swanson scores. Michael Conforto to 3rd. Michael Conforto advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jake Fraley. Michael Conforto advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch reaches on a throwing error by catcher Hunter Feduccia. Nico Hoerner scores. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch reaches on a throwing error by catcher Hunter Feduccia. Nico Hoerner scores. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Michael Busch out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 1st.
